caption: A video captures a meeting of the "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs" on "April 12, 2019," as indicated by on-screen text. The scene takes place in a wood-paneled room where four people are seated at a table. A man in a dark suit and glasses sits on the left, initially leaning on his hand before straightening up. Next to him, a man with a grey beard wearing a blue suit and tie listens and then begins to gesture with his hands while speaking. A man in a beige vest and glasses and a woman in a floral blouse are also present. The table holds water bottles, glasses, and documents. An "ORCA" logo appears in the bottom left corner, and a green banner reads "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage." Across the sequence, the man in the blue suit becomes more animated as he speaks to the group.
